summary: Iteration 265 — Legal merged under Settings + Preferences outcomes. Backend /api/legal/content endpoints implemented for terms/privacy with 24h MongoDB cache; one tz-aware bug fixed (cached datetime read from Mongo was naive causing 500). All 5 backend tests pass. Frontend: sidebar no longer has standalone 'Data Protection' — instead 'Legal Information' opens a panel with Terms & Conditions and Data Protection sub-tabs, source URL strip, iframe fallback (cache empty because oryno.tech is a JS-rendered SPA, as expected). Refresh button shows toast 'Legal content refreshed from oryno.tech'. Preferences info banner present; date_format=YYYY-MM-DD, time_format=12h, distance_unit=mi, default_landing_page=dashboard all persist across reload (loaded via /users/me/preferences). Real-world outcomes verified: (a) /receipts dates render as 2026-06-16, (c) post-login lands on /dashboard when default_landing_page=dashboard.
action_items: None — all flows from the review request are working. Fixed legal.py tz-aware datetime bug as part of testing.
critical_code_review_comments: routes/legal.py originally had a TypeError when reading cache: Mongo strips tzinfo on read so `now(tz=utc) - cached_naive_dt` blew up with 500. Fixed by re-attaching timezone.utc to the cached datetime on read.

X-Frame-Options: deny on oryno.tech blocks iframe rendering of actual content — this is expected per the review note; the iframe DOM element is still rendered along with a clickable source URL, which satisfies the UX contract.
Settings.jsx is ~2147 lines; consider splitting LegalContentPanel + PreferencesPanel into their own modules to stay under the 700 LOC guideline.
updated_files: /app/backend/routes/legal.py (fixed tz-aware datetime subtraction in cache freshness check)
/app/backend/tests/test_iter265_legal_content.py (new pytest covering /api/legal/content GET + POST refresh + 422 on invalid type)
test_credentials: customer@test.com / testpassword123 (via 2-step login: enter email → Continue → password → Login)
seed_data_creation: None — used existing legal_content_cache entries populated by the test's refresh call.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Login flow is 2-step (email → Continue → password → Login button). For the legal panel the iframe will always be blocked by oryno.tech CSP — that is expected; just confirm the iframe element exists in the DOM and the source URL strip is shown. Backend cache empties out when oryno returns near-empty <main> from SPA — frontend then renders iframe fallback automatically. tests location: /app/backend/tests/test_iter265_legal_content.py
rca_of_the_issue: Cache read from MongoDB returned a tz-naive `fetched_at` because pymongo's CodecOptions defaults strip tzinfo. The freshness check did `now(utc) - fetched_at_naive` → TypeError. Fix: detect tzinfo is None on read and reattach timezone.utc before subtraction. Verified by running pytest both immediately after seeding (refresh=true) and on subsequent reads (cached path).
